notes: v0.3.18: Audio mix tap — fixes crackling + adds peer audio to video clips. Streams the full audio mix (both players) from Rust output callback via lock-free ring buffer to frontend WebAudio. Eliminates getUserMedia dual-mic-capture entirely. Zero latency impact on live jam. Also: H.264/MP4 back as preferred clip format, VP8 default for live peer streaming to prevent codec mismatch.
